name: Fix Conductor durationMs bug (delete-after-read)
desc: In heady-conductor.js:129-136, capture startTime = activeExecutions.get(executionId)?.startTime BEFORE delete, then compute durationMs correctly

name: Add O(1) category index to HeadyConductor routing
desc: Add _categoryIndex = new Map() to heady-conductor.js updated on registerBee() — replace O(197) for-loop dispatch with O(1) map lookup

name: Add HCFullPipeline runs Map LRU eviction
desc: In hc-full-pipeline.js:48, add maxRuns=1000 config and after run completion, evict oldest entry if size > maxRuns to prevent unbounded memory growth

name: Fix Monte Carlo in pipeline to use worker thread
desc: In hc-full-pipeline.js:365, wrap monteCarlo.runFullCycle(scenario, 1000) in worker_threads.Worker to prevent 1000-iteration CPU block on event loop

name: Fix self-awareness vectorMemory require
desc: In self-awareness.js:33-34, import { VectorMemory } and create instance: vectorMemory = new VectorMemory() — fix runtime TypeError at ingestMemory() call

name: Fix self-awareness O(n) ring buffer filter with rolling counters
desc: In self-awareness.js:164-170, replace 4x Array.filter() passes with rolling error/event counters updated on push/pop — reduce O(500) to O(1) per event

name: Fix self-awareness process.on to use global.eventBus
desc: In self-awareness.js:312, replace process.on('heady:circuit', ...) with global.eventBus.on('circuit:tripped', ...) for multi-process compatibility

name: Fix buddy-core learnedRules O(n) Array to O(1) Map
desc: In buddy-core.js:139, replace this.learnedRules = [] with this.learnedRules = new Map() and update find() calls to .get(errorKey)

name: Fix buddy-core appendFileSync to async audit queue
desc: In buddy-core.js:1069, replace fs.appendFileSync() with async buffer — drain every 500ms or when buffer reaches 50 entries

name: Fix buddy-core global.eventBus.emit to use Heady EventBus
desc: In buddy-core.js:340-341, replace global.eventBus.emit('bee:alerts', ...) with HeadyEventBus instance call for process-safe emission

name: Fix heady-conductor.js EventEmitter to import HeadyEventBus
desc: In heady-conductor.js:22, replace const EventEmitter = require('events') with HeadyEventBus import to unify cross-service events

name: Fix hc-full-pipeline _wireAutoTelemetry to use HeadyEventBus
desc: In hc-full-pipeline.js:71-114, replace callback-based telemetry wiring with global.eventBus.emit() calls for event-driven telemetry

name: Fix ternary-logic shadow index to use hash Set
desc: In ternary-logic.js:127-134, maintain _shadowHashes = new Set() alongside array — check Set for O(1) duplicate detection

name: Fix edge-diffusion.js singleton to class export
desc: In edge-diffusion.js:30, change module.exports = new EdgeDiffusion() to module.exports = { EdgeDiffusion } to allow injection and testing

name: Fix package.json test script fuser Linux-only dependency
desc: In package.json:38, replace fuser -k 3300/tcp with cross-platform port cleanup: npx kill-port 3300 2>/dev/null || true

name: Fix heady-registry.json version to match package.json
desc: In heady-registry.json:4, update version from 3.0.1 to match package.json version 3.1.0 — resolve cross-file version inconsistency

name: Fix bee-factory.js BEES_DIR to dedicated data/ path
desc: In bee-factory.js:35, change BEES_DIR from __dirname to path.join(__dirname,'../../data/dynamic-bees') and add data/dynamic-bees/ to .gitignore

name: Fix conductor taskType prototype pollution vulnerability
desc: In heady-conductor.js:242-250, add validation: if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9:_-]+$/.test(taskType)) return 400 Bad Request before dispatch

name: Fix bee-factory SSRF vulnerability in health checks
desc: In bee-factory.js:191-211, add URL validator blocking 10.x.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x, 192.168.x.x, 169.254.x.x before any fetch()

name: Fix buddy audit log to write to PostgreSQL not local disk
desc: In buddy-core.js:1066-1071, replace fs.appendFileSync() with async INSERT into audit_log PostgreSQL table for durability on Cloud Run

name: Fix checkPreemptive exact-match to add fuzzy matching
desc: In buddy-core.js:397-399, extend exact errorKey match with normalized-key comparison stripping whitespace and extra chars

name: Fix conductor dispatch input validation
desc: In heady-conductor.js dispatch endpoint, add Joi or manual schema validation for taskType, payload size limits, and sanitized input

name: Fix selfAwareness scanDomain to skip in test environment
desc: In self-awareness.js:60-79, add guard: if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'test') return null before any production URL fetch

name: Fix heady-registry.json add all 9 domains to Cloudflare zones
desc: In heady-registry.json:151-155, add all 9 domains (headyme.com, headyapi.com, heady-ai.com, etc.) to zones array

name: Fix conductor _categoryIndex not updated on registerBee
desc: Ensure _categoryIndex.set(category, [...existing, beeId]) is called in registerBee() and .delete() in unregisterBee()

name: Fix all core-package.json author.email to canonical address
desc: Update all *-core-package.json files to use eric@headyconnection.org as canonical maintainer email

name: Add queryMemory method to VectorMemory (fix buddy-core:632)
desc: Add queryMemory(query, limit=10, threshold=0.5) method to vector-memory.js as typed alias for search() to fix buddy runtime crash

name: Add ingestMemory method to VectorMemory (fix self-awareness:173)
desc: Add ingestMemory(key, content, metadata, namespace) method to vector-memory.js as alias for store() to fix self-awareness runtime crash

name: Fix WebSocket voiceSessions reconnection strategy
desc: In heady-manager.js:59, add exponential backoff reconnection: 2s, phi*2s, phi^2*2s... on WebSocket close event

name: Align heady-manager.js description to reflect actual role
desc: Update README to clarify heady-manager.js is bootstrap orchestrator, not API gateway — actual gateway is worker-api-gateway.js

name: Fix HCFullPipeline naming to use hc-full-pipeline.json
desc: Rename hcfullpipeline.json to hc-full-pipeline.json and update all references to standardize kebab-case file naming

name: Fix all API routes to use /api/v1/ or /api/v2/ prefix
desc: Audit all Express route registrations — add /api/v1/ to unversioned routes in conductor, buddy, vector — standardize API versioning

name: Fix edge-diffusion EDGE_DIFFUSION_API to real backend
desc: In edge-diffusion.js, implement real HuggingFace Inference API call using process.env.HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY for actual image generation

name: Fix heady-manager bootstrap phase error isolation
desc: Wrap each require() in heady-manager.js 10-phase bootstrap in try/catch with degraded mode flags — allow partial boot on phase failure

name: Fix bee-factory registry silent failure race condition
desc: In bee-factory.js:94-97, replace silent try/catch with event emission: emit('bee:registry-miss', {domain}) for observability

name: Fix VectorMemory Float64Array to Float32Array
desc: In vector-memory.js:49-52, change Float64Array to Float32Array to halve 384-dim vector memory from 3KB to 1.5KB per entry

name: Fix DuckDB persistent analytics for pipeline history
desc: In hc-full-pipeline.js, persist executionLog to DuckDB table for analytical queries on stage timing trends over time

name: Fix VectorMemory DRIFT_THRESHOLD to use env var
desc: In vector-memory.js:20, replace hardcoded DRIFT_THRESHOLD=0.75 with parseFloat(process.env.VECTOR_DRIFT_THRESHOLD || '0.75')

name: Fix self-critique engine to receive pattern engine improvements
desc: Verify patternEngine 'improvement:created' events correctly flow into selfCritique.recordImprovement() per engine-wiring.js:309-315

name: Fix heady-hive morph-engine to support 10K bees
desc: Extend morph-engine.js with BeeRegistry class, spawn/retire lifecycle methods, and Fibonacci-stepped scaling (fib(1)->fib(20) bee count)

name: Fix heady-orchestration to have full pipeline state machine
desc: Replace stub k8s-operator.js and monte-carlo-scheduler.js with full 12-stage orchestration state machine managing HCFullPipeline

name: Fix heady-federation to have dynamic remote resolution
desc: Extend federation-loader.js with full registry, dynamic remote URL resolution, and versioned contract validation for micro-frontends

name: Fix domain routing table to include all 9 headyos.com domains
desc: Add headyos.com to domain routing table in heady-registry.json — either register domain or route through headysystems.com/os

name: Fix heady-doctor/auto-heal.js to consolidate under HeadyHealer
desc: Merge heady-doctor.js, auto-heal.js, and _selfHeal() into HeadyHealer class with Stage-level, Service-level, Infrastructure-level tiers

name: Fix VECTOR_SHARD_PATH validation at manager startup
desc: In heady-manager.js Phase 4, add fs.accessSync(VECTOR_SHARD_PATH, fs.constants.W_OK) check before proceeding with vector stack boot

name: Fix heady-mcp service to full 42-service tool registry
desc: Expand heady-mcp service layer with auth enforcement, rate limiting, connection pooling, and all 42 Heady service tool definitions

name: Fix heady-hive swarm to have bee spawn registry
desc: Build bee registry in heady-hive with UUID-keyed entries, capability tags, health scores, and last-seen timestamps

name: Fix circuit breaker state machine with phi-backoff
desc: Implement CLOSED->OPEN on fib(3) failures, HALF_OPEN probe after phi^5*1000ms, CLOSED on probe success — wire into all service calls

name: Fix batch vector ingest in DeterministicErrorInterceptor
desc: In buddy-core.js:339-351, queue error resolutions and batch-ingest to vector memory every 100ms instead of individual calls

name: Fix source-map.json to document HeadyMe vs HeadySystems org confusion
desc: Update source-map.json secondary_sources to clarify relationship between HeadyMe and HeadySystems GitHub orgs

name: Add HMAC-signed request headers for internal service auth
desc: Implement HMAC-SHA256 signed X-Heady-Service-Sig header in heady-service-mesh.js for all internal service-to-service calls

name: Add JWT aud claim validation across all 9 domains
desc: In auth-session service, issue JWTs with aud = ['headyme.com','headysystems.com','headybuddy.org',...all 9 domains] and validate in middleware

name: Add security headers to all internal API routes
desc: Add helmet.js security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, HSTS) to all Express routes, not just Cloudflare edge routes

name: Fix source-map.json missing secondary sources documentation
desc: Update source-map.json to document all 9 core repos as secondary sources with their deployment domains and responsibilities

name: Fix Vector compression to use MessagePack
desc: In vector-memory.js persist(), use msgpackr to serialize vectors instead of JSON-lines — reduce storage by 60% for 384-dim float arrays
